reviews.review_description: I've only been playing this for an hour and I'm stumped. This is really making the little grey cells work and I am enjoying the puzzle quite a bit. It's been a while since I last had something so challenging. Hints will be used lol.

I am a puzzle lover and already enjoyed the mystery box series.
Basically there is one puzzle cube box to be solved. If no hint system, I could not proceed from some points but I completed less than one hour upon help of hints. You must look closely on the cubes to find solution and use your imagination.
And there are more text based puzzles almost impossible to solve for me.   
Currently there are some bugs but I believe that the developer will fix them soon.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback, glad you liked this puzzle game! Feel free to get in touch with me at https://xsgames.co with more details ;)
